column2: English Explanation
column3: 中文解释

column2: Kernel GPU execution duration measured by Nsight Compute, in microseconds.
column3: Nsight Compute 测得的 kernel 在 GPU 上执行耗时，单位为微秒。

column2: Total number of thread blocks launched for this kernel.
column3: 本次 kernel 启动的线程块总数。

column2: Number of CUDA threads in each block.
column3: 每个线程块中的 CUDA 线程数量。

column2: Total launched CUDA threads, equal to grid size times block size.
column3: 启动的 CUDA 线程总数，等于线程块数乘以每块线程数。

column2: Grid size normalized by SM count and the resident-block limit per SM; shows how many block waves are available per SM.
column3: 按 SM 数量和每个 SM 可驻留 block 上限归一化后的 block 波次数，用来判断任务量是否足够填满 GPU。
column5:
max resident blocks/SM = min(4 static limits)=2
64/（84*2）=0.38

column2: Registers allocated per thread by the compiler.
column3: 编译器为每个线程分配的寄存器数量。

column2: Shared memory allocated per block, including compiler and launch overhead reported by NCU.
column3: 每个线程块分配的 shared memory，包含 NCU 口径下的编译器或启动附加开销。

column2: Maximum resident blocks per SM if only the architectural block-count limit is considered.
column3: 只考虑架构允许的 block 数量上限时，每个 SM 最多可驻留的 block 数。

column2: Maximum resident blocks per SM limited by the register file capacity.
column3: 受寄存器文件容量限制时，每个 SM 最多可驻留的 block 数。

column2: Maximum resident blocks per SM limited by shared-memory capacity and configuration.
column3: 受 shared memory 容量和配置限制时，每个 SM 最多可驻留的 block 数。

column2: Maximum resident blocks per SM limited by the maximum resident warp count.
column3: 受每个 SM 最大驻留 warp 数限制时，每个 SM 最多可驻留的 block 数。

column2: Average active warps as a percentage of the hardware peak active warp capacity.
column3: 平均活跃 warp 数占硬件峰值可活跃 warp 数的百分比。

column2: Overall SM throughput as a percentage of peak sustained throughput over elapsed cycles.
column3: 整个 kernel 期间 SM 总吞吐占峰值持续吞吐的百分比。

column2: Fraction of elapsed cycles in which SM subpartitions were active.
column3: SM 子分区处于 active 状态的周期占总 elapsed 周期的比例。

column2: Number of warp-level instructions executed on the FMA pipeline.
column3: FMA 管线上执行的 warp 级指令数量。

column2: Predicated-on thread-level SASS FFMA instruction count.
column3: predicate 为真的线程级 SASS FFMA 指令数量。

column2: Predicated-on thread-level SASS floating-point multiply instruction count.
column3: predicate 为真的线程级 SASS 浮点乘法指令数量。

column2: Predicated-on thread-level SASS floating-point add instruction count.
column3: predicate 为真的线程级 SASS 浮点加法指令数量。

column2: Total bytes transferred through DRAM, reported in megabytes.
column3: DRAM 实际传输的总字节数，单位为 MB。
column5: 理想值12.583MB, 和AB重复利用程度相关

column2: DRAM bytes read by the kernel, reported in megabytes.
column3: kernel 从 DRAM 读取的字节数，单位为 MB。

column2: DRAM bytes written by the kernel, reported in megabytes.
column3: kernel 写入 DRAM 的字节数，单位为 MB。

column2: DRAM throughput as a percentage of peak sustained DRAM bandwidth.
column3: DRAM 吞吐占峰值持续 DRAM 带宽的百分比。

column2: GPU-level DRAM throughput as a percentage of peak sustained DRAM bandwidth.
column3: GPU 级 DRAM 吞吐占峰值持续 DRAM 带宽的百分比。

column2: Combined compute and memory pipeline throughput relative to the peak sustained rate.
column3: 综合计算和内存管线吞吐相对峰值持续吞吐的百分比。

column2: Global-load bytes observed by L1TEX/LSU, reported in gigabytes.
column3: L1TEX/LSU 观测到的 global load 字节数，单位为 GB。

column2: Global-store bytes observed by L1TEX/LSU, reported in megabytes.
column3: L1TEX/LSU 观测到的 global store 字节数，单位为 MB。

column2: Average number of L1TEX sectors touched per global-load request.
column3: 每个 global load 请求平均触达的 L1TEX sector 数。
column7: float4 load, 单 request 更大、request 数约少 4 倍

column2: Average number of L1TEX sectors touched per global-store request.
column3: 每个 global store 请求平均触达的 L1TEX sector 数。

column2: Total traffic observed by L2 cache, reported in megabytes.
column3: L2 cache 观测到的总流量，单位为 MB。

column2: Number of shared-memory load wavefronts issued through the LSU data pipe.
column3: 通过 LSU data pipe 发出的 shared memory load wavefront 数量。

column2: Number of shared-memory store wavefronts issued through the LSU data pipe.
column3: 通过 LSU data pipe 发出的 shared memory store wavefront 数量。

column2: Total shared-memory bank conflicts observed on the LSU pipe.
column3: LSU 管线上观测到的 shared memory bank conflict 总数。
column7: A转置 warp tiling 向量化

column2: Total warp-level instructions executed by the SMs.
column3: SM 执行的 warp 级指令总数。

column2: Warp-level instructions executed on the load/store unit pipeline.
column3: load/store unit 管线上执行的 warp 级指令数量。

column2: Duplicate FMA-pipeline instruction metric emitted during CSV merge.
column3: CSV 合并时出现的重复 FMA 管线指令指标。

column2: Total thread-level instructions executed across SM subpartitions.
column3: 所有 SM 子分区执行的线程级指令总数。

column2: Thread-level instructions whose predicate was true and therefore executed effectively.
column3: predicate 为真、实际生效执行的线程级指令数量。

column2: Average thread-level instructions per warp-level instruction; 32 means a full warp participated.
column3: 每条 warp 级指令平均对应的线程级指令数；32 表示满 warp 参与。

column2: Percentage of branch instructions whose target was uniform across participating threads.
column3: 参与线程的分支目标一致的分支指令百分比。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles stalled waiting at barriers such as __syncthreads().
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中因等待 barrier（如 __syncthreads()）而停顿的比例。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles stalled on long-latency dependencies, often global memory or L2.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中因长延迟依赖（常见于 global memory 或 L2）而停顿的比例。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles stalled on short-latency dependencies, often shared-memory or register reuse latency.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中因短延迟依赖（常见于 shared memory 或寄存器复用延迟）而停顿的比例。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles stalled because the math pipeline could not accept more instructions.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中因数学管线无法继续接收指令而停顿的比例。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles stalled by the MIO pipeline, commonly due to memory/shared-memory instruction pressure.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中因 MIO 管线受限而停顿的比例，通常与内存或 shared memory 指令压力有关。
column7: 主要收益，降低来memory instruction/shared pipeline

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles where the warp was ready but another warp was selected to issue.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中 warp 已就绪但调度器选择了其他 warp 发射的比例。

column2: Share of active-warp issue cycles where no instruction was available to issue for the warp.
column3: 活跃 warp 发射周期中该 warp 没有可发射指令的比例。

column2: Global-load bytes observed by L1TEX/LSU, reported in megabytes.
column3: L1TEX/LSU 观测到的 global load 字节数，单位为 MB。
